g.text: E. Masked local naturalization uses the generative sampler without losing grammar constraints
Hard sparse scaffold and anchors define the editable region; the sampler fills local detail and material; projection closes the loop.
Ablation story: rule-only preserves structure but looks schematic; global repair drifts; masked local repair improves visual quality while keeping support admissible.
